name: Artichoke Squares #2
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pan, sauté the onion and garlic in marinara sauce from one jar of artichoke hearts until softened.
2. Beat the eggs and stir in the bread crumbs, chopped artichoke hearts (from both jars), oregano, salt, pepper, Tabasco, onion mixture, and shredded cheddar cheese.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased 9 x 13 inch or 7 x 11 inch baking pan.
4. Bake at 325°F for 30 minutes, or until set.
